abstract: This dataset is a supplement to the article " β-catenin deficiency in forebrain excitatory neurons induces fear memory deficits and physiological alterations." The dataset comprises a suite of scripts designed to analyze the data obtained in ABF format following the execution of a series of standard electrophysiological protocols. The execution of these scripts occurs over every ABF file contained within a folder, in an unsupervised manner, methodically analyzing a series of commonly calculated futures from each protocol.
